name: Red Pepper Polenta
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Good Seasons Roasted Garlic, OR Cheese Garlic Salad Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water and salad dressing mix to a boil in a medium saucepan.
2. Slowly pour the cornmeal into the boiling water while stirring constantly.
3. Cook on low heat for 20-25 minutes, or until the polenta begins to pull away from the sides of the pan. Stir frequently during this time.
4. Add the chopped roasted red pepper and shredded cheddar cheese. Continue stirring until the cheese is fully melted.
5. Serve immediately, or let cool before sautéing or grilling before serving.
Prep Time: 10 minutes
Cooking Time: 30 minutes
